coca-cola: Coca-Cola bottles are typically dark in color with a distinctive label. The label features easily identifiable red branding. The shape of the bottle is usually symmetrical and cylindrical with a rounded red cap.
fanta: [{'fanta': 'A transparent plastic bottle with a contoured, slightly flattened shape, typically containing a brightly colored carbonated beverage. The bottle is sealed with a cap that matches the dominant color of the liquid, and features a prominent label displaying the brand name "Fanta" in white text on a green and orange background. The label is clearly visible and centrally positioned, enabling reliable identification of the product. The bottle is designed for beverage consumption and is commonly found in retail or storage settings.'}]
sprite: Sprite bottles are normally green, with a distinct label displaying the Sprite logo. The bottles have a slender, uniform shape with a green cap.
